card_description: Paul (Latin (Paulus): "Small/humble") is a historical figure appearing in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. In the biblical tradition, Paul is apostle who received vision on road to damascus. PKD saw parallels between Paul's Damascus vision and his own 2-3-74 experience. Appears in 7 Exegesis passages. Associated with dictionary terms: Paul. Context: "Dick identifies his role as a "Wolf in Sheep’s Clothing" (or vice versa), covertly delivering the Gospel to Marxists through his fiction."
